memoryArtifacts.headline: The family of John Howland, Mayflower passenger: five generations by Hunter, Mardenna Johnson, 1910- pg 1
Mayflower Families Through Five Generations Vol 23 Part I John Howland part 2 of 4
memoryArtifacts.description: If you are related to John Howland and Elizabeth Tilley then you are also related to three other Mayflower Pilgrims, John and Mrs. John Tilley and their daughter, Elizabeth Tilley.

memoryArtifacts.headline: Monument to the Children of John and Elizabeth Tilley Howland | Burial Hill Cemetery | Plymouth, Massachusetts
Hope Howland Cemetery
memoryArtifacts.description: Hope's stone is the middle one in the foreground. The reference point to find it is the low, grass-roofed crypt which is beside the interior cemetery road in the back left of this photo. There are two stone pillars flanking the road in to the cemetery which are VERY narrow so a larger car will not be able to drive in.

popularStory.headline:
Hope Howland Chipman
(30 August 1629 – 8 January 1683)
popularStory.description:
Hope (Howland) Chipman was a daughter of Mayflower passengers John Howland and Elizabeth (Tilley) Howland.

This is a cenotaph found at Burial Hill in Plymouth, Massachusetts, placed there by the Pilg …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hope Howland於1629年8月30日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯時，她的父親John Howland31歲，母親Elizabeth Tilley11626歲。她於1646年與John Chipman在美國麻薩諸塞州普萊姆斯普萊姆斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1683年1月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波享年53歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波洛斯羅普 希爾 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hope Howland于1629年8月30日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯时，她的父亲John Howland31岁，母亲Elizabeth Tilley11626岁。她于1646年与John Chipman在美国马萨诸塞州普萊姆斯普萊姆斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1683年1月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波享年53岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波洛斯羅普 希爾 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Howland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Howland was the name of three Quaker brothers, original settlers in Marshfield, MA. They were from Huntingdonshire, England. The eldest, John Howland (c. 1593–1672) was a passenger on the Mayflower, servant to Gov. John Carver, who died in the first winter at Plymouth Colony.

variants.name: Holland
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Hope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the vocabulary word (Old English hopa) denoting the quality, in particular the Christian quality of expectation in the resurrection and in eternal life. The name was created by the Puritans and has been one of their most successful coinages.

historicEvents.description: Oldest Grave Seen in the Memorials List

en.lifeSummary: When Hope Howland was born on 30 August 1629, in Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, her father, John Howland, was 31 and her mother, Elizabeth Tilley, was 11626. She married John Chipman in 1646, in Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 9 daughters. She died on 8 January 1683, in Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 53, and was buried in Lothrop Hill Cemetery, Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hope Howland est née le 30 août 1629, à Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Howland, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Tilley, avait 11626 ans. Elle a épousé John Chipman en 1646, à Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 janvier 1683, à Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Lothrop Hill Cemetery, Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hope Howland am 30. August 1629 in Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Howland 31 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Tilley 11626. Sie hat 1646 in Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten John Chipman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. Januar 1683 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Lothrop Hill Cemetery, Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hope Howland è nata il il 30 agosto 1629 nel Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, John Howland, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Tilley, aveva 11626 anni. Lei sposato John Chipman nel 1646, nel Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 8 gennaio 1683, nel Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Lothrop Hill Cemetery, Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Hope Howlandが1629年8月30日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニープリモウスで生まれた時，父John Howlandは31歳，母Elizabeth Tilleyは11626歳であった。1646年にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州プリモウスプリモウスでJohn Chipmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1683年1月8日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーバーンスタブルで53歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州バーンスタブルバーンスタブルロスロップ ヒル セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hope Howland(이)가 1629년 8월 30일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 플림우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Howland(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Tilley(은)는 11626세였다. 그녀는 1646년 미국 매사추세츠 주 플림우스 플림우스에서 John Chipman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1683년 1월 8일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 바른스타블일에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 바른스타블일 바른스타블일 로스럽 힐 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hope Howland nasceu em 30 de agosto de 1629, em Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Howland, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Tilley, tinha 11626 anos. Ela casou-se com John Chipman em 1646, em Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de janeiro de 1683, em Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Lothrop Hill Cemetery, Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hope Howland родилась 30 августа 1629 г. в местности плимоут, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Howland было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Tilley, 11626. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Chipman в 1646 г. в местности плимоут, плимоут, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 9 дочерей. Она умерла 8 января 1683 г. в местности барнстабл, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности лотроп хилл кеметири, барнстабл, барнстабл, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.
